author: Julien Tanay
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Display Tasks in a Kanban board view with columns for each status

manifest.author: Julien Tanay
manifest.description: Display Tasks in a Kanban board view with columns for each status.
manifest.name: Tasks Kanban
